# ps2sdk-open-source-sdk-build

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Target | ps2-prodg-eb-linux |
| Type | open-source-sdk-build |
| Status | planned |

## Public Notes

Planned reproduction recipe for building public PS2SDK as an open-source compatibility lane while keeping ProDG and proprietary Sony material out of the repo.

## Environment

- clean checkout of the public PS2SDK repository at the recorded ps2sdk-master-head commit
- host compiler and toolchain prerequisites selected from public ps2dev documentation
- no ProDG, proprietary Sony SDK files, or private game assets committed to this repository
- public-safe sample program or toolchain smoke test
- local build transcript and compatibility notes captured as derived metadata

## Steps

- clone or update the public PS2SDK source repository listed in the artifact record
- verify the local checkout commit against the ps2sdk-master-head snapshot record
- use ps2dev public documentation to identify toolchain, library, and environment assumptions
- build the open-source SDK components without using ProDG or proprietary Sony SDK material
- compile a minimal public-safe sample when available
- record build commands, diagnostics, produced libraries or tools, and compatibility boundaries as public metadata
- promote repeatable commands into the PS2 ProDG / EB / Linux clean-room compatibility packet

## Expected Outputs

- source snapshot manifest
- open-source SDK build environment manifest
- compiler transcript
- library and tool inventory
- public-safe sample-build notes
- ProDG and proprietary-boundary notes
- dependency gap list

## Artifacts

- ps2-ps2sdk-open-source-sdk
- ps2-linux-release-10-official
- ps2-linux-pal-installation-discs-archive-item
- ps2-sn-systems-prodg-lineage
